rspb-skylark-8x32.description: With superb clarity for the price, Skylark is a fantastic starter binocular. Fully waterproof and nitrogen-filled for clear views whatever the weather.
features: Twist-up or twist-down eyecups for comfortable viewing
Supplied with case, strap and protective caps
Built for regular birding and wildlife use
